summary: Comprehensive testing of TikTok Auto Commenter dashboard completed successfully. All 25 backend API tests passed, frontend UI fully functional with all requested features working.
seed_data_creation: Test data seeded via bulk reports API after delete cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints tested and working. Frontend uses Supabase directly for comment data (comment_reports, live_logs tables). Backend uses MongoDB for auth endpoints. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.

backend_auth: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user and returns token
POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - returns user with valid token
POST /api/auth/register with team_name - creates user with team as admin
backend_reports: GET /api/reports - returns all reports with pagination
frontend: Dashboard loads with title 'TikTok Comments Dashboard'
Stats cards display (This Month, This Week, Today, All Time) with correct values
Target Configuration banner shows 25 Profiles, 100 Videos/Profile, 2,500 Daily Target
Reports table displays with columns: Time, Profile, Comment, Brand, Video
100 report rows displayed with data-testid attributes
100 video links with target='_blank' for external navigation
Import button visible and clickable (triggers file input)
Export CSV button visible and enabled (triggers download)
Date Range filter with 2 date inputs
Today's Comments by Brand section shows brand breakdown (Kollabsy, Bump Syndicate, Bump Connect)
Live Automation Logs panel displays with real log entries
Logs show timestamps and automation status (SUCCESS, synced to Supabase, etc.)

design_review.color_scheme: Dark theme (zinc-950 background) with excellent text contrast
design_review.stats_cards: 4 cards with gradient borders and distinct colors (violet, blue, emerald, zinc)
design_review.brand_colors: Distinct colors for each brand (emerald=Kollabsy, amber=Bump Syndicate, violet=Bump Connect)
design_review.table: Clean design with hover effect on rows
design_review.logs_panel: Color-coded log messages (green=success, red=error, blue=info, amber=warning)
design_review.responsive: Grid layout responsive for different screen sizes

architecture_notes.frontend_data_source: Supabase (direct queries for comment_reports and live_logs tables)
architecture_notes.backend_data_source: MongoDB (for auth endpoints - users, teams, team_invites collections)
architecture_notes.realtime: Supabase Realtime subscriptions for instant updates on new comments and log changes
